CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-21-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Continued To Oct-07-02 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES: Mandatory Settlement Conference. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff. Plaintiff appears with counsel, David M. Poore, Esq.; defendant appears with counsel, Walter R. Schneider. Counsel and the parties discuss settlement and recite the terms of a tentative settlement into the record. The matter is continued to October 7, 2002, at 11:00 AM, in Department 210, for further settlement conference. Each to pay own attorney fees and costs.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Continued To Sep-30-02 At 04:00 P.M. In Dept 210

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Walter R. Schneider, Esq. of HANSON BRIDGETT 925-8408 specially appearing for defendant LYNN SEARLE demurring to the First Amended Complaint
Armen L. George, Esq. 425/898-7237 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:
Defendant Lynn Searle's Demurrer to Amended Complaint:
Demurrer to First Cause of Action for Breach of Contract is SUSTAINED with leave to amend (terms of alleged contract not set forth in the first amended complaint.)
Demurrer to Second Cause of Action for wrongful denial of contract is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. See Freeman & Mills 11 Cal 4th 85
Demurrer to Third Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege specifics with respect to misrepresentations
(AJR/md) Karen Farnsworth, CSR 5162

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2002 Set For Trial On Oct-21-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-30-02 At 04:00 P.M. In Dept 624

Defendant Searle'S Demurrer.
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin M. Smith, Esq., 415-899-1770, appeared on behalf of defendant and demurring party Lynn Searle. Curtis Kekoa, Jr., 415-515-6187, appeared as opposing party on his own behalf.

After argument the demurrer of Lynn Searle to plaintiff's complaint was sustained with twenty days leave to amend except for the demurrer to the second cause of action for specific performance which is sustained without leave to amend. (JJM/RC) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Feb-01-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Peter H. Bonis, Esq., (510-893-3800)appeared on behalf of plaintiff Curtis Kekoa. Kevin M. Smith, Esq., (415-899-1770) appeared on behalf of defendant Lyn Searle.

Matter was argued and taken under submission. (JJM/RC) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
